text:
<<On Sat, 06 Feb 1999 20:09:28 +0900, Hideyuki Suzuki <hideyuki@sat.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp> said:

> I would like this to be merged into stable before 3.1-RELEASE.
> Is it possible?

Possible, yes, but you'll have to find some other committer actually
test it and do the merge.  I'm tapped out for time right now.

-GAWollman
